topic.what: Black-box text steganography using dynamic codebook constructed from public image-caption context via multimodal LLM
topic.how: Uses visual semantic anchors in public images to generate session-specific codebooks, encrypted mapping, and XOR-based offset masking for secret embedding/extraction
topic.why_matters: Enables practical covert communication without exposing steganographic behavior or requiring shared model weights, overcoming limitations of white-box (behavior exposure) and prior black-box (fixed codebook inflexibility) methods

characteristics.what_it_measures: Text fluency of generated stego captions
characteristics.context: Evaluated on 15000 stego texts using GPT-2 reference model

characteristics.what_it_measures: Semantic preservation between cover and stego text
Statistical imperceptibility of stego vs cover distribution
characteristics.context: Lower KLD indicates closer match to cover text distribution

characteristics.what_it_measures: Average secret bits embedded per word
characteristics.context: 5 codewords embedded per stego caption with 28 bits per codeword

characteristics.what_it_measures: Fraction of trials correctly recovering seed words within k attempts
Seed word extraction robustness after OSN transmission
characteristics.context: Tested on WeChat, Instagram, Facebook, X, WeiBo

characteristics.what_it_measures: Human assessment of generated stego text naturalness
characteristics.context: 30 CS undergraduates rated fluency, clarity, grammaticality
Minimal impact on semantic alignment between image and caption

characteristics.what_it_measures: Recovery rate stability across generation temperatures

novelty: Dynamic codebook construction from public image-caption context per session
Encrypted steganographic mapping with XOR-based offset masking
Feedback optimization mechanism based on reject sampling for reliable extraction
Black-box framework eliminating shared model weights between communicating parties
open_problems: Video extension shows higher cost and lower stability than image setting
Reliability depends on generator preserving visual semantic anchors (Qwen yields 64-68% S@3)
Extension to other modalities (audio) not yet explored
Strong multimodal understanding shown by Gemini outperforming GPT thinking abilities
